{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Gate
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Gate]] is a swirling presence in the air near Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
